subsystems.reason: Use real shared-key and shape stats between 2512 and 2511 to justify a delta merge path without pretending the strategy is the same thing as structural parity.
Layered is compared against its ancestry base first, then mapped onto the 2512 foundation as adapter-only logic unless exact parity is proven.
Base VAE channels RGB (3->3) vs layered VAE channels RGBA (4->4).
Foundation rope hint `2D-or-rotary` vs layered rope hint `Layer3D`.
